ignoreCommand: bash -c 'SUBJECT=$(git log -1 --format="%s"); AUTHOR=$(git log -1 --format="%ae"); if echo "$SUBJECT" | grep -q "\[skip ci\]"; then echo "Skipping: [skip ci] in commit message"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$AUTHOR" | grep -qE "(bot@mobius|cursoragent@cursor)"; then echo "Skipping: bot commit by $AUTHOR"; exit 0; fi; echo "Building: $SUBJECT"; exit 1'
